title: andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia
intro: Andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia, also known as the mountain bell or Andromeda, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and the Korean Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia include the potential relief of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-cancer agent. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are made from its leaves and flowers, and are consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
